name: TailHunt
description:
TAILHUNT FULL BIO

“Find a hole. Or be one.”

TailHunt: Holes Worth Hunting

TailHunt is Aurum Bay’s active hookup app for gloryholes. Hosts offer their bodies—anal, oral, vaginal, or penile—while Visitors browse and arrive. Matching is based on preferences recorded in the TailHunt Profile form. Listings rotate live by proximity and can be queued into or requested—depending on the Host’s setting.

Olli’s Hole (609) is here. So are many others.

For Hosts

You create a Hole when you want to be used. Just fill out your Host Hole Profile: pick your service, add rules, note your kinks, and toggle the access system—either accept-only or queueing. Then you go live on the map.

Nearby Visitors will see your location pin and offer. You choose whether to approve them (if accept-only), or let them arrive freely (if queueing). Requests include species, age, orientation, rating, and appearance description. Visitors come to you—one at a time or in fast rotation. You can set your hold to Closed or Open at any moment and change settings what service you provide (anal, oral, vaginal, or penile) while not in use.

For Visitors

Hit Search Hole and the map opens. You’ll see real-time listings near your current location, with top cards for the three closest Holes. Each card shows what’s being offered, by whom, and what the rules are. Some listings allow instant queueing. Others require you to send a request.

If approved, the app unlocks the exact location and approach instructions. You'll know what’s inside before you go: species, orientation, service, and optional preview image. High-traffic Holes may have short queues. Maximum wait is three total.

Kinks & Customization

Every listing includes stated kinks, theme, and extra notes. From breeding holes and group-use themes to scent-heavy setups, gag-only holes, and full denial zones—Hosts choose what they're used for. Visitors are expected to follow exactly what’s posted. Enforcement is live and system-linked.

Olli (609) posts frequent anal under blue door access. Gimp-hooded oral is occasional. Breed at will or wait your turn—he's accept-only.

Safety & Enforcement

Every user is identity-verified at sign-up. Consent boundaries, orientation settings, and limit enforcement are system-locked into place. The SOS button is available at all times, with rapid-response support, formal report options, and legal guidance.

You can’t break rules here without being seen and removed.

OFFICIAL TAILHUNT USER GUIDE
